--- title: "Data Viz Spring 2026" image: morocco.jpg about: template: jolla links: - icon: linkedin text: LinkedIn href: www.linkedin.com/in/baxter-lowell - icon: github text: Github href: https://github.com/blowell19 --- This is my blog for Data Viz class in the spring of 2026 at St. Lawrence University. I will be using what we cover in class to look at a variety of topics that interest me, such as sports, politics, country data, and anything else that might catch my eye. Enjoy!
